title: Iceball
description: Adds new types of snowballs to the game
body:
### Adds snowball variants that do various amounts of damage when thrown
- Iceball - 1hp
- Packed Iceball - 5hp
- Blue Iceball - 10hp
- Boomball - Explodes on impact
- Lightning Ball - 1hp (can be charged in a chest with lightning)
- Charged Lightning Ball - Summons lightning where it lands
- Spikeball - 30hp (drops from ominous vault)
- Meatball - Food item that is slightly better than beef
- Cooked Meatball - Fills your saturation and half of your hunger bar
- Bouncy Ball - Bounces when thrown - 1hp
- Big Bouncy Ball - Place it to ride
